data.title: Trump Urges Iran to Decide on Nuclear Deal Amidst Turmoil
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has commented on the current situation in Iran, describing it as chaotic. According to Odaily, Trump stated on Truth Social that Iran is uncertain about how to sign a nuclear agreement and urged the country to make a decision promptly.

data.title: DOGE broke through $0.105, with a daily increase of over 6%.
data.description: OKX data shows that DOGE has broken through $0.105 and is currently trading at $0.1057, with a 24-hour increase of over 6%.

data.title: U.S. Court Sentences Maximilien de Hoop Cartier to Eight Years in Crypto Laundering Case
data.description: A U.S. court has sentenced Maximilien de Hoop Cartier to eight years in prison for his involvement in a cryptocurrency laundering scheme that allegedly processed over $470 million in drug proceeds. According to NS3.AI, Cartier admitted guilt to charges of operating an unlicensed money transmitting business and conspiracy to commit bank fraud. In addition to the prison sentence, the court mandated the forfeiture of approximately $2.36 million and specific shell company bank accounts linked to the operation.

data.title: Silicon Motion Shares Surge 21.9% Pre-Market Following Strong Q1 Revenue
data.description: Silicon Motion, a company listed in the United States, saw its shares rise by 21.9% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, the company's first-quarter revenue exceeded expectations, contributing to the positive market response.

data.title: Trump: Iran should sign a nuclear-free agreement as soon as possible
data.description: Trump posted on Truth Social that the current situation in Iran is chaotic, and that Iran "does not know how to sign a nuclear-free agreement," urging it to make a decision as soon as possible.

data.title: Eurozone March M3 Money Supply Growth Exceeds Expectations
data.description: The Eurozone's M3 money supply growth rate for March was reported at 3.2%, surpassing the anticipated 3.1% and the previous value of 3.00%. According to Jin10, this data reflects a slight increase in the monetary expansion within the Eurozone, indicating a potential shift in economic conditions.

data.title: OpenGradient Completes First Season OPG Token Distribution
data.description: OpenGradient has announced the completion of its first season OPG token distribution. According to Foresight News, the project is preparing to commence its second season of distribution. The development of the project's mainnet is also progressing steadily.

data.title: STOCKS | Seagate Technology Shares Surge 18% Pre-Market on Strong Q3 Revenue
data.description: Seagate Technology (STX.O), a leading storage chip manufacturer, saw its shares rise nearly 18% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, the company's revenue for the third fiscal quarter of 2026 reached $3.11 billion, surpassing expectations.

data.title: NXP Semiconductors Shares Surge 17.2% Pre-Market on Strong Q2 Profit and Revenue Forecasts
data.description: NXP Semiconductors saw its shares rise by 17.2% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, the company has projected that both its profit and revenue for the second quarter will exceed expectations.

data.title: Kalshi Launches Music Streaming Trading Market
data.description: Kalshi, a prediction market platform, has announced the official launch of its music streaming trading market. According to Foresight News, users can now trade on the weekly Spotify play counts of artists such as Drake, Taylor Swift, Justin Bieber, and Bad Bunny. The market is currently open for trading.

data.title: ECB Expected to Raise Interest Rates Three Times This Year
data.description: On April 29, Jin10 reported that the money market currently anticipates the European Central Bank (ECB) will increase interest rates three times this year, with each hike amounting to 25 basis points.

data.title: Italy's April Consumer Confidence Index Falls Short of Expectations
data.description: Italy's consumer confidence index for April, as reported by Istat, was recorded at 90.8. According to Jin10, this figure fell short of the anticipated 91.2 and was a decline from the previous value of 92.6.

data.title: The Israeli military says the head of Hamas's military intelligence headquarters operations department has died.
data.description: The Israel Defense Forces and the Israel Security Directorate (Shin Bet) issued a joint statement on the 29th, stating that an airstrike launched by both sides in northern Gaza on the 28th killed Iyad Ahmed Abdul-Rahman Chambari, the head of the operations department of the military intelligence headquarters of the Palestinian Islamic Resistance Movement (Hamas). (Xinhua)

data.title: OpenAI and Microsoft Advance Strategic Partnership
data.description: OpenAI has announced a new phase in its strategic partnership with Microsoft. According to Foresight News, Microsoft will continue to be OpenAI's primary cloud computing partner and retain priority access. However, the exclusivity of Microsoft's OpenAI intellectual property license will be adjusted to non-exclusive. Microsoft remains a major shareholder in OpenAI's business development.

data.title: Ronin to Transition to Ethereum Layer 2 on May 12
data.description:
Ronin, a blockchain platform for games, has announced its migration to Ethereum Layer 2 scheduled for May 12. According to ChainCatcher, this transition will involve a downtime of approximately 10 hours, after which normal operations will resume. The underlying architecture will be built on the OP Stack and will integrate EigenDA for data availability.

Users are advised to unstake RON before the migration date or wait for the system to automatically unstake after the transition. The primary goal of this migration is to leverage Ethereum's security, data availability, and settlement capabilities, while enhancing the Ethereum ecosystem with robust on-chain gaming infrastructure. Ronin serves as the foundational network for popular blockchain games like Axie Infinity and Pixels, marking a significant milestone in its ecosystem development.

Post-migration, the annual inflation rate of RON will decrease from over 20% to below 1%. Additionally, the treasury will benefit from new revenue streams including staking, Sequencer net profits, and increased Marketplace fees, which will rise from 0.5% to 1.25%.

data.title: EU Warns of Prolonged Impact from US-Israeli Conflict in Iran
data.description: The European Union has issued a warning that the continent could face years of challenges due to the ongoing conflict involving the United States and Israel in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that the EU is concerned about the long-term implications of the war, which could affect various sectors across Europe. The conflict has already led to disruptions in trade and energy supplies, and the EU is preparing for potential economic and political repercussions. Officials are urging member states to brace for a prolonged period of instability and to consider measures to mitigate the impact on their economies. The situation remains fluid, and the EU is closely monitoring developments to assess the full extent of the fallout.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum claim threshold for the AIGENSYN airdrop is 227 points, and claiming it will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha will launch Gensyn (AIGENSYN) on April 29th at 17:00 (UTC+8) and open trading. Users holding at least 227 Binance Alpha Points can claim a 715 AIGENSYN airdrop on the event page, on a first-come, first-served basis. If the event continues, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must confirm the claim within 24 hours, otherwise it will be considered a forfeit. Only limit orders are supported for the first two hours of the event; market orders will be available after two hours.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Demand Remains Strong Amid Uncertainty, Analyst Says
data.description: On April 29, Jin10 reported that Priyanka Sachdeva from Phillip Nova highlighted in a report that the potential demand for gold as a hedge against uncertainty remains robust. According to Jin10, this suggests that even if the upward momentum is limited, macro-level uncertainties will continue to provide structural support for gold prices. She noted that the strengthening of the U.S. dollar and expectations of interest rate cuts have limited gold's upward momentum, as these factors diminish the appeal of non-yielding assets like gold.

data.title: Axelar Tests Won-Based Stablecoin with XRP Ledger Korea and Hana Financial TI
data.description: Axelar has successfully completed a proof-of-concept in collaboration with XRP Ledger Korea and Hana Financial TI to explore the issuance, distribution, and settlement of a stablecoin based on the South Korean won. According to NS3.AI, this initiative aims to prepare for the potential regulatory formalization of stablecoins and evaluate the feasibility of a digital asset denominated in the South Korean won within a real-world financial institution setting.

data.title: South Korea Investigates Crypto Market Manipulation Cases
data.description: South Korea's Financial Services Commission has referred suspects involved in two cases of virtual asset market manipulation to investigative agencies. According to NS3.AI, these cases involve traditional pump-and-dump schemes and the exploitation of APIs specifically designed for cryptocurrency trading. The authorities are focusing on uncovering the methods used in these manipulations to ensure market integrity and protect investors.
